arabic:
حَدَّثَنَا مُسَدَّدٌ، حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى، عَنْ شُعْبَةَ، بِمَعْنَاهُ قَالَ ‏
"‏ عَرِّفْهَا حَوْلاً ‏"‏ ‏.‏ وَقَالَ ثَلاَثَ مِرَارٍ قَالَ فَلاَ أَدْرِي قَالَ لَهُ ذَلِكَ فِي سَنَةٍ أَوْ فِي ثَلاَثِ سِنِينَ ‏.‏

english.narrator: The aforesaid tradition has also been transmitted by Shu’bah through a different chain of narrators to the same effect.  The version goes :
english.text: He said : Make it known for a year.  He said this three times.  He said: I do not know whether he said “for a year” or “for three years”.

arabic.title: سنن أبي داود
arabic.author: الإمام سليمان بن الأشعث أبو داود السجستاني

english.title: Sunan Abi Dawud
english.author: Imam Sulayman ibn al-Ash'ath Abu Dawud al-Sijistani

chapter.english: The Book of Lost and Found Items
